subcodes.first_line: O candle of the assemblage of Baha'is! In this meadow thou hast blossomed like the rose and the jasmine, and like the nightingale at dawn thou hast scattered pearls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع انجمن بهائیان در این چمن چون کل و یاسمن شکفتی و چون مرغ سحر لئالی
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @knowledge; recognition of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
